title: Diplocaulobium tentaculatum
taxonomy: Diplocaulobium tentaculatum is a species of orchid native to New Guinea. The plant is classified within the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it is placed within the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Malaxideae. Further classification includes the genus Diplocaulobium and the species tentaculatum. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and morphology.
